{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124714245776FF0BD0EC9604F0"}"},"total":46},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323568495069037366","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一个故事一个故事的看，不知不觉就看完了。灵异故事的书，我以前也看过，很恐怖，很恐怖的那种，吓得书都丢的也有，像作者这种温馨，带着平实的真实的故事 ，是第一次看，其实真实的故事 ，更能引起人的共鸣，不浮夸，不水文，故事细腻，条理清晰，加上每一个猜测不到的结局，令人害怕 ，令人心酸 ，既有恐怖也有平淡，温情和灵异结合，更有人间烟火味，再经作者巧妙的语言文字表达出来，令人信服！支持作者，好评！","text_exts":[{"e":164,"s":160,"text":"人间烟火","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774068435EC9604F0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227323568495069037366%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227243997363600100352%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705152444,"group_id":"7243997363600100352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N52FPRkjNjU+kqKbmKXWXGq+V6Bqy0wCd4XcaC2jBdBn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a666149c8c2c4e45bb21d1a216b157cb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615996&x-signature=qOGeIZXEILqYiq4UFk1a2mbtwlY%3D","user_id":"3676416466238868","user_name":"妖倾情"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3676416466238868","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7243997363600100352","book_info":{"abstract":"不系统+不穿越+不爽文+不后宫+不无敌+不甜文+不套路+无女主+不修仙，重点提醒：不喜勿入，不喜勿入，不喜勿入!你相信这个世界上，有鬼吗？你亲身经历过灵异事件吗？出生在八十年代中期的我，生来就是属阴体质，极易招惹那些“脏东西”，经历过死人附身，大仙驱邪，还有冤魂附身开口说话等等一一系列的真实事件，让我知道那些是真实存在于这个世界的……一直到现在，各种各样的灵异事件，都正在发生着……正所谓:
鬼神之事畏且敬，举头三尺有神明。
心存正气行天下，何惧夜半敲门声。
信则有之疑则无，是非真假皆所书，
若非亲身奇经历，何来妙笔生花出。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/055c6652018bef098e85c79b576ead6c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"敬轩诗人","author_id":"","book_id":"7243997363600100352","book_name":"灵异事件之我的见闻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7243997368150917684","read_count":"229","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"147","tags":"悬疑灵异,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/08cd172413db83760e32ca5e5d307d3d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252435&x-signature=4snVhghGyQtWdj%2FXOdVkmewB%2BAg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2326198279735459","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"372"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124714245776FF0BD0EC9604F0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":74268,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":149564,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":242},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1705156699,"author_reply_time":1705156695,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7302324093650387724","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的构思独特，情节跌宕起伏，人物形象鲜明，让人仿佛置身于一个神秘而又充满惊悚的世界之中。恐怖的氛围渲染得恰到好处，让人夜不能寐，却又欲罢不能。小说中的灵异事件逻辑严密，引人入胜。
作者的文笔诙谐幽默，让人在惊悚之余，还能感受到一丝轻松与愉悦。这部灵异小说无疑是一部佳作，值得大家一读！","text_exts":[{"e":128,"s":124,"text":"灵异小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%B5%E5%BC%82%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774068435EC9604F0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227302324093650387724%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227243997363600100352%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%B5%E5%BC%82%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700206934,"group_id":"7243997363600100352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"擅长把激动人心的情节处理得如同嚼蜡。本人二次元肥宅一枚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZOQ7tZPOjErJW6T+e1YSrgtcSyVpTpSW5R2Gn0qcw1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0faf548ed15469e839d2f992fa84985~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621916&x-signature=Xmh72ZrAnBxsYHZBjJL480Uv8Eg%3D","user_id":"1772841559664008","user_name":"虐凝梨宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1772841559664008","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7243997363600100352","book_info":{"abstract":"
